control_awareness: Aware that amounts >= 1,000,000 require department_head approval per Amount-based approval control, so splitting helps optimize approval timing.
expected_control_effect: Approval routing will assign manager-level approvers to each request, reducing approval lead time.
overall_reason: The purchase need amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold for department_head approval, which has a longer lead time. Since incremental requests are allowed, splitting the purchase into two work packages each under 1,000,000 optimizes approval timing by requiring only manager-level approval, meeting the needed-by date with lower approval lead time.
reason: Splitting the total amount into two requests each below 1,000,000 allows manager-level approval, which has a shorter estimated lead time than department_head approval required for amounts >= 1,000,000.
